html.zh: Davis 和 Putnam 1960 年 《ACM 杂志》 论文提出了量词理论证明过程。Davis、Logemann 与 Loveland 1962 年发表于 《ACM 通讯》 的文章报告了一个定理证明机器程序，形成了 DPLL 这一脉络。
html.en: Davis and Putnam's 1960 JACM paper introduced a proof procedure for quantification theory. The 1962 Communications of the ACM article by Davis, Logemann, and Loveland reported a machine program for theorem proving, creating the DPLL lineage.

html.zh: 界面应展示有纪律的分支搜索：简化子句、传播被迫赋值、选择变量分裂，并在分支不可能时回溯。这一流程把逻辑可满足性问题组织成可系统探索和剪枝的搜索树。
html.en: The interface should show disciplined branching: simplify clauses, propagate forced assignments, split on a variable, and backtrack when a branch becomes impossible. This process organizes satisfiability into a search tree that can be explored systematically and pruned when contradictions appear.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Davis-Putnam 和 DPLL 视为实用 SAT 求解背后的基础工作。它们的长期影响在于搜索与传播结构至今仍支撑现代求解器，即使后来加入了学习、重启、watched literals 和启发式策略。
html.en: Experts generally treat Davis-Putnam and DPLL as foundational work behind practical SAT solving. Their long-term legacy is the search-and-propagate structure that still underlies modern solvers, even after learning, restarts, watched literals, and heuristics were added.

quote.en: "a uniform proof procedure for quantification theory is given"
quote.zh: "给出了量词理论的统一证明过程"

workTitle.en: A Computing Procedure for Quantification Theory

workAuthors.en: Martin Davis and Hilary Putnam, Journal of the ACM, 1960

quotePage.zh: BenchCouncil AI100：自动定理证明 / Davis-Putnam 算法与 DPLL

quoteAttribution.en: A Computing Procedure for Quantification Theory, Martin Davis and Hilary Putnam, Journal of the ACM, 1960
quoteAttribution.zh: 《量词理论的计算过程》, 马丁·戴维斯、希拉里·普特南, 《ACM 杂志》, 1960

method.zh: 带传播的 SAT 搜索

material.zh: 《ACM 杂志》 论文 + CACM 程序

text.en: The 1960 procedure used logical transformations to attack quantification theory and propositional satisfiability. It made proof search more systematic than earlier brute-force attempts.
text.zh: 1960 年过程用逻辑变换处理量词理论和命题可满足性。它让证明搜索比早期暴力尝试更系统。

text.en: DPLL refines SAT solving into recursive branching plus simplification. Each choice either builds a model or reveals a contradiction that prunes the branch.
text.zh: DPLL 把 SAT 求解改进为递归分支加简化。每次选择要么构造模型，要么暴露矛盾并剪去分支。

text.en: When a clause has only one possible literal left, the solver must assign it. This forced move can trigger a cascade of simplifications.
text.zh: 当一个子句只剩一个可能文字时，求解器必须赋值。这个被迫动作可能触发一连串简化。
